examples: Extruded feeds for marine fish include Turbot and swellfish.
A ultra performance liquid chromatography-tandem mass spectrometry(UPLC-MS/MS) method was developed for determination of altrenogest and chlormadinone in swellfish.
A ultra performance liquid chromatography-tandem mass spectrometry(UPLC-MS/MS) method was developed for determination of altrenogest and chlormadinone in swellfish, eel and roasted eel.
